projects.name: HighSignal
projects.purpose: Search, retrieval, and AI intelligence engine — the lab for everything search/IR, vector, and RAG.
milestones: Hybrid search with reciprocal rank fusion
projects.nextAction: Implement BM25 over the indexed article corpus.

projects.name: Codevetter
projects.purpose: Code intelligence and AI devtool — the lab for code search, review agents, and structured AI output.
milestones: Semantic code search over a repository
AI review agent with tool calling
projects.nextAction: Add a structured-output schema for review findings.

projects.name: SassMaker
projects.purpose: Reusable infra/dev workshop — where backend components (API keys, rate limiter, job queue) become reusable modules.
milestones: Reusable job queue with retries and DLQ
projects.nextAction: Extract the rate limiter into a standalone module.

projects.name: tiny-vector-db
projects.purpose: A from-scratch vector database to internalize ANN, filtering, and recall/latency tradeoffs.
milestones: Brute-force exact index with metadata filtering

projects.name: tiny-search-engine
projects.purpose: A from-scratch search engine to internalize inverted indexes, BM25, WAL, and segment storage.

projects.name: sarthakagrawal.dev
projects.purpose: Proof-of-work hub — where artifacts and writeups get published.
projects.nextAction: Draft a writeup from the first completed artifact.

projects.name: Significant Hobbies
projects.nextAction: Test one programmatic SEO page template.

projects.name: Quant Lab
projects.purpose: Math made real — simulations, from-scratch implementations, and a simple quant research pipeline (returns, risk, backtests).
milestones: Descriptive stats + random-process simulators from scratch
Matrix ops, OLS, and PCA without libraries
Returns ingestion, risk metrics, momentum backtest vs benchmark
projects.nextAction: Implement mean/variance/correlation on a CSV without pandas.

projects.name: Aliveville
projects.purpose: Fun AI agents/game lane — agent loops, memory, and tool use without production pressure.
projects.nextAction: Prototype a single agent loop with two tools.
